channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Van has been abandoned outside our house for weeks., 27th March
item.description:
Car has not moved. Makes it difficult for visitors to park outside our house when required and also blocks view pulling off the drive way. Checked and doesn’t belong to any neighbours.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cloisters Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical item, 27th March
item.description:
Electrical item dumped by bins on floor
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fieldfare Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 27th March
item.description:
Obstructing pedestrians parking and driving on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lincoln Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes centre common road, 27th March
item.description:
Numerous potholes centre of this road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Centre Common Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 27th March
item.description:
The first street light on the corner of Meadow View leading onto Sherwood Park Ave has not been working for a few weeks now, this is immediately opposite our house and at night it is very dark and difficult to navigate the pavement and grass verges on both sides of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Meadowview, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Rat hole in grass verge outside 217 Crescent Drive, 27th March
item.description:
This has been there a few month now and is active. I have inserted a hose pipe down the hole which extended to quite a depth. Could it be a crack in the storm drain adjacent? A neighbour has told me that he had seen a rat emerge from the hole and was quite large. I would be grateful if the problem is addressed as soon as possible as it is of great concern. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree about to fall into the road east bound, 27th March
item.description:
Bus 86 driver reporting a tree about to fall into the road east bound
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 27th March
item.description:
On path area leading up to field between the two Longlands Allotment plots. Has been there more than 24 hours. Please move. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Longlands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley and recycling bin, 27th March
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolley and recycling bin Left outside 33 Linden Grove on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no number plate, 27th March
item.description:
Seems abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car wothout number plate has been there for ancouple of months, 27th March
item.description:
Probably abandoned. Needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Lane, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post not working outside 1-8 Laurel Court SE1 6AY, 27th March
item.description:
This is a Peabody estatebut Peabody have refused to replace the LED in the Peabody lampost directly located outside 1-8 Laurel Court as they said this the Councils responsibility "The lamp posts are numbered 1422(08), 1422(09), and 1422(10) and are located on the pavement outside the block. As they are council property, we are not authorised to carry out repairs on them."

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harper Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manor Road dumping by businesses, 27th March
item.description:
More dumping outside the businesses along Manor Road where the waste is coming from. I live along the street and see it happen every day from these businesses Something needs to be done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lawnmower box, 27th March
item.description:
This has been here for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shawbrooke Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping rubbish outside own business, 27th March
item.description:
As usual a large amount of rubbish has been dumped outside of the businesses by the business owners along Manor Road. I have images which clearly show the business address on the cardboard boxes being dumped so they are doing it outside their own property!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two flytipped items on Chipperfield Road, 27th March
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Ravenscourt Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Company left rubbish on pavement, 27th March
item.description:
A company (who have also put up adverts on street furniture) undertook works at a property. They have left a bag of rubbish by the tree outside 175 Elsa Road where they parked. I saw them remove it from the property they were working at and leave it behind their parked van. This was done on Thursday 26th March. Despite returning on 27th to continue working they have not removed the bag.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elsa Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement on Camden Road is complete obstacle course!, 27th March
item.description:
Illegal make shift signs have been put up by local shops. It is difficult to navigate when able bodied, let alone for those with mobility or sight issues. For those with small children, buggies and wheelchairs, it is a health and safety hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69A, Camden Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, no MOT, 27th March
item.description:
Abandoned car
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wheelbarrow, 27th March
item.description:
Dumped on pavement, can it be removed please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
